title: Dishmatic Sponges, Foam, White, 3 Count (Pack of 3)
features: Pack of 9 Sponges – Includes 3 x 3 non-scratch white refill sponges for Dishmatic handles
Gentle on Surfaces – Specially designed non-scratch pads, safe for use on non-stick cookware, glass, and delicate surfaces
Effective Cleaning – Tough on grease and grime while protecting your pans and dishes
Easy to Replace – Simply clip onto your Dishmatic handle for hassle-free sponge replacement
Everyday Essential – Ideal for kitchens, ensuring sparkling clean results without scratches
description: Keep your dishes spotless with the 3 x 3 Dishmatic Non Scratch White Refill Sponges Cleaning Scourer (Pack of 9). Designed for use with the Dishmatic handle, these non-scratch refills are gentle yet effective, making them perfect for cleaning non-stick cookware, glass, and other delicate surfaces without leaving marks. The tough yet safe sponge material helps remove grease and grime with ease while protecting your pans and kitchenware. Easy to attach and replace, these sponges are an essential everyday cleaning solution for a sparkling clean kitchen.
